subcodes.first_line: The mention of the Primal Point, His servant who hath believed in God and hath been named with one of Our names, He Who was the All-Merciful. Verily [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر نقطه الاولی عبده الذی آمن بالله و سمی باسم من اسمائنا الذی کان رحیما ان
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @fellowship with the wayward and ungodly, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
